name: visualize-local
description: Create dark temporary HTML visualizations and open them locally in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Dark local HTML visualizations for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Visualize Local creates self-contained dark-themed HTML demos, explainers, calculators, dashboards, and slide-style interactions in private temp storage, then opens them through a local Codex browser preview server.
defaultPrompt: Use $visualize-local to create an interactive calculator demo.
Use $visualize-local to visualize Conway's Game of Life.
